% This is generated by ESQL's ToRangeTests. Do not edit it. See docs/reference/query-languages/esql/README.md for how to regenerate it.

## Example

```esql
ROW from_dt = TO_DATETIME("2000-01-01T00:00:00.000Z"), to_dt = TO_DATETIME("2010-01-01T00:00:00.000Z")
| EVAL r = TO_RANGE(from_dt, to_dt)
| KEEP r
```

| r:date_range |
| --- |
| 2000-01-01..2010-01-01 |
